title: Crispy Pork Wrap
description: A flavorful Vietnamese-inspired wrap filled with crispy pork and fresh herbs.
instructions: 1. In a shallow dish, mix together flour, ginger, and black pepper.
2. Dredge the pork slices in the flour mixture, shaking off excess.
3. Heat 1/2 cup of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add the pork slices to the skillet and cook until crispy and golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
5. Remove the pork from the skillet and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
6. Warm the rice paper wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
7. Assemble the wraps by placing a few pieces of the crispy pork onto the center of each wrap, followed by a few cilantro leaves and a lime wedge.
8. Drizzle hoisin sauce and sriracha over the pork and serve immediately.
